channel.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

item.title: [ERI1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack E101B06 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Apr 21, 20:00 - 22:00 UTC

Mar 3, 20:15 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our dedicated servers offer.

Start time : 21/04/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 21/04/2026 22:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers will be unavailable during the maintenance for 90 minutes each.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our infrastructure, we will be relocating the servers currently located in rack E101B06 to rack ERI0102E02C.

Thank you for your understanding.
